introSection: Outer Space Flying Car (Chinese: 太空飞车) was a steel roller coaster built by Chinese firm Jinma Rides previously located at Country Garden Farm in Panyu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China.
fullText: Outer Space Flying Car (Chinese: 太空飞车) was a steel roller coaster built by Chinese firm Jinma Rides previously located at Country Garden Farm in Panyu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China.
